group_summaries.group_overview:
- **48 merged PRs** in [ocaml/opam-repository](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository) delivered new package releases and extensive OCaml 5.4.0 compatibility work
- **Package ecosystem growth** with diverse new packages spanning terminal UI frameworks, web APIs, embedded systems, React hooks validation, and data structures
- **Compatibility management** prioritized with multiple upper bounds added for OCaml 5.4.0 and cmdliner 2.0.0 transitions across the ecosystem
- **Documentation infrastructure improvements** in [ocaml/ocaml.org](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org) with environment variables documentation, performance timing, and governance transparency enhancements
- **Policy discussions** initiated on opam-2.0 deprecation and OCaml compiler version support with input from maintainers
- **Missing package documentation** reported by multiple users, with consensus to migrate issues to [ocaml-docs-ci](https://github.com/ocurrent/ocaml-docs-ci) repository
group_summaries.cross_repository_work:
- **Package documentation pipeline** improvements coordinated between [ocaml/opam-repository](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository) package releases and [ocaml/ocaml.org](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org) documentation infrastructure, with external services documentation explaining the relationship with [ocaml-docs-ci](https://github.com/ocurrent/ocaml-docs-ci) in [ocaml/ocaml.org#3470](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3470)
- **Missing documentation reports** for packages like lwt6 in [ocaml/ocaml.org#3451](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3451), eio, and domainslib in [ocaml/ocaml.org#3461](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3461), QCheck 0.90/0.91 in [ocaml/ocaml.org#3437](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3437) correlate with package releases in [ocaml/opam-repository](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository), establishing clearer issue reporting paths
- **Governance updates** reflected across both repositories with [Hannes Mehnert](https://github.com/hannesm) contributing to security team contacts in [ocaml/ocaml.org#3462](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3462) and initiating OCaml compiler support discussion in [ocaml/opam-repository#29059](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29059)
- **Platform releases backlog** prepared by [sabine](https://github.com/sabine) in [ocaml/ocaml.org#3444](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3444) covers tools that are distributed through [ocaml/opam-repository](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository) including Dune, Merlin, OCaml-LSP, and opam
- **OCaml 5.4.0 compatibility work** in [ocaml/opam-repository](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository) aligns with governance team coordination, particularly the Language Committee and Standard Library Team listings added in [ocaml/ocaml.org#3460](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3460)
group_summaries.notable_discussions:
- **CI infrastructure issue** resolved in [ocaml/opam-repository](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository) where Docker manifest inspection timeouts caused "No job variant" errors across multiple workflows in [ocaml/opam-repository#29296](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29296), explained by [Mark Elvers](https://github.com/mtelvers) as 504 Gateway Timeouts during periodic SHA polling
- **opam-2.0 deprecation discussion** ongoing with [Hannes Mehnert](https://github.com/hannesm) and [Anil Madhavapeddy](https://github.com/avsm) noting the team is moving toward deprecating opam 2.0.x in favor of 2.1+ in [ocaml/opam-repository#28952](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/28952) and [discuss.ocaml.org](https://discuss.ocaml.org/t/proposal-make-the-minimum-tested-opam-2-1-and-higher/17736)
- **OCaml compiler support policy** discussion initiated by [Hannes Mehnert](https://github.com/hannesm) proposing to narrow supported versions to OCaml 4.14+ and 5.3+ from current 4.08.1-5.4.0 range in [ocaml/opam-repository#29059](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29059), with [Anil Madhavapeddy](https://github.com/avsm) noting Debian 11 LTS support ending August 2026 (OCaml 4.11.1) as reasonable minimum floor
- **Missing package documentation** reported by multiple users including [Raphaël Proust](https://github.com/raphael-proust) for lwt6 in [ocaml/ocaml.org#3451](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3451), [Alina Banerjee](https://github.com/alinab) for eio and domainslib in [ocaml/ocaml.org#3461](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3461), and ongoing discussion about QCheck 0.90/0.91 documentation in [ocaml/ocaml.org#3437](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3437), with consensus to migrate issues to [ocaml-docs-ci](https://github.com/ocurrent/ocaml-docs-ci) repository
- **Governance page visibility** discussed by [Nicolás Ojeda Bär](https://github.com/nojb) proposing to make it a top-level navigation item in [ocaml/ocaml.org#3466](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3466), with [Cuihtlauac Alvarado](https://github.com/cuihtlauac) suggesting it fits better under the Community section
- **OCaml Planet RSS feed** enhancement requested by [Puneeth Chaganti](https://github.com/punchagan) to include full blog post content instead of snippets in [ocaml/ocaml.org#3459](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3459), referencing [Yawar Amin](https://github.com/yawaramin)'s previous request in [ocaml/ocaml.org#3125](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3125) for improved offline reading support
group_summaries.emerging_trends:
- **OCaml 5.4.0 preparation** intensifying with multiple upper bound additions in [ocaml/opam-repository](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository) indicating breaking AST changes, particularly affecting Longident types and parser-related packages requiring coordination across the ecosystem in [ocaml/opam-repository#29316](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29316), [ocaml/opam-repository#29314](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29314), [ocaml/opam-repository#29299](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29299), and [ocaml/opam-repository#29304](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29304)
- **cmdliner 2.0.0 migration** progressing with major packages like `dune-release` 2.2.0 in [ocaml/opam-repository#29307](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29307) and `capnp-rpc` 2.1.1 in [ocaml/opam-repository#29277](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29277) updating to support the new API, signaling broader ecosystem transition
- **Terminal UI development** gaining traction with new framework **mosaic** providing React-inspired hooks and The Elm Architecture in [ocaml/opam-repository#29312](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29312), alongside **domainpc** for multicore programming in [ocaml/opam-repository#29317](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29317), indicating growing interest in modern UI patterns
- **Async I/O ecosystem** evolution continuing with Lwt 6.1.0 addressing bugs in [ocaml/opam-repository#29295](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29295), compatibility fixes for `inotify` in [ocaml/opam-repository#29305](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29305), and related package updates showing active maintenance of concurrent programming infrastructure
- **Parser and formal methods** tooling advancing with menhir 20260122 release in [ocaml/opam-repository#29263](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29263), menhir-lsp improvements in [ocaml/opam-repository#29318](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29318), fstar source package distribution in [ocaml/opam-repository#29099](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29099), and frama-c updates demonstrating ongoing investment in verification tools
- **Package constraint management** becoming more sophisticated with proactive compatibility work by maintainers, particularly [Jan Midtgaard](https://github.com/jmid) addressing version conflicts before they impact users in [ocaml/opam-repository#29316](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29316), [ocaml/opam-repository#29314](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29314), and [ocaml/opam-repository#29313](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/pull/29313)
- **Documentation infrastructure improvements** becoming a priority in [ocaml/ocaml.org](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org) with work on explaining external documentation generation in [ocaml/ocaml.org#3470](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3470), improving error messages for missing docs in [ocaml/ocaml.org#3471](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3471), and establishing clear issue reporting paths to [ocaml-docs-ci](https://github.com/ocurrent/ocaml-docs-ci)
- **Governance transparency** being enhanced through comprehensive team listings in [ocaml/ocaml.org#3460](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3460) and [ocaml/ocaml.org#3467](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3467), improved contact information in [ocaml/ocaml.org#3462](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3462), and discussions about making governance information more discoverable in [ocaml/ocaml.org#3466](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3466)
- **Build system optimization** efforts with the proposed replacement of ood-gen code generation (119MB of generated OCaml) with binary serialization via data-packer (17MB binary), promising 2.5x CPU reduction in [ocaml/ocaml.org#3463](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3463)

group_summaries.brief_summary: Dune sandboxing rollout, LSP custom request expansion, js_of_ocaml parser improvements, and OxCaml integration progressing
group_summaries.new_features_summary: Dune sandboxing, package management CLI, LSP destruct request, js_of_ocaml eval security, Merlin signature help fix
group_summaries.new_features:
- **Dune sandboxing** now enabled by default for test execution starting from dune 3.22 ([ocaml/dune#13510](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13510)) and MDX tests from version 0.5 ([ocaml/dune#13504](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13504)), plus sandbox cleanup improvements ([ocaml/dune#13511](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13511)) and fixed sandboxed action promotions ([ocaml/dune#13520](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13520)) by [Rudi Grinberg](https://github.com/rgrinberg)
- **Dune package management** gained new `--pkg` CLI flag enabling or disabling package management from command line with `--pkg=enabled` and `--pkg=disabled` options ([ocaml/dune#13458](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13458)) by [Ambre Austen Suhamy](https://github.com/ElectreAAS)
- **Dune OxCaml workspace support** allowing `(using oxcaml 0.1)` stanza in workspace files ([ocaml/dune#13395](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13395)) by [Simon Spies](https://github.com/spiessimon)
- **Dune promotion fixes** allowing promotion into non-existent directories ([ocaml/dune#13493](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13493)) and promoting files over directories when cram tests change formats ([ocaml/dune#13516](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13516)) by [Rudi Grinberg](https://github.com/rgrinberg)
- **LSP destruct custom request** (`ocamllsp/destruct`) enables case analysis to generate or complete pattern matchings via new API endpoint ([ocaml/ocaml-lsp#1583](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp/issues/1583)) by [Xavier Van de Woestyne](https://github.com/xvw)
- **Merlin signature help** now stops after the last parameter instead of looping back to the first, fixing confusing behavior with too many arguments ([ocaml/merlin#2023](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/2023)) by [Charlène_Gros](https://github.com/Lucccyo)
- **Merlin locate-types** now includes an `Other` variant for type expressions that don't fit other categories ([ocaml/merlin#2025](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/2025)) and strips wrapping `option` type from optional parameters ([ocaml/merlin#2027](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/2027))
- **Merlin record field autocompletion** fixed to properly suggest field names when completing record expressions ([ocaml/merlin#2028](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/2028))
- **js_of_ocaml runtime eval** now uses indirect eval with optional chaining (`eval?.()`) and prepends `"use strict"` directive for improved security and performance ([ocsigen/js_of_ocaml#2108](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2108)) by [Jérôme Vouillon](https://github.com/vouillon)
- **js_of_ocaml parser** gained support for decorators in class and method syntax ([21da6678](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/21da6678c28134a6d5011c1914faa3a0de669c9b)) and HTML comments in scripts ([87b7ae83](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/87b7ae83eee4ab723e1f7662756eed2694fce077)) by [Jérôme Vouillon](https://github.com/vouillon)
- **js_of_ocaml loop miscompilation** fixed for loops at start of exception handlers ([ocsigen/js_of_ocaml#2151](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2151)) by [Jérôme Vouillon](https://github.com/vouillon)
- **Odoc dune version requirement** updated from 3.18 to 3.21 with cram test renaming to comply with empty alias requirement ([ocaml/odoc#1398](https://github.com/ocaml/odoc/issues/1398))
group_summaries.activity_summary: Cross-tool OxCaml integration, opam cmdliner 2.0 upgrade, LSP custom request expansion, js_of_ocaml release preparation
group_summaries.activity:
- **OxCaml compiler integration** progressing across multiple tools with Dune workspace support merged ([ocaml/dune#13395](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13395)), ongoing js_of_ocaml support for parameterized libraries ([ocaml/dune#13414](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13414)) by [Antonio Nuno Monteiro](https://github.com/anmonteiro), and odoc upstreaming PR opened ([ocaml/odoc#1399](https://github.com/ocaml/odoc/issues/1399)) leveraging dune 3.21's new `%{ocaml-config:ox}` variable by [@art-w](https://github.com/art-w) rebasing [Luke Maurer](https://github.com/lukemaurer)'s patches
- **Dune promotion system refactoring** with extensive cleanup moving display logic to command line ([ocaml/dune#13473](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13473), [ocaml/dune#13482](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13482), [ocaml/dune#13483](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13483)), removing unnecessary scheduler uses ([ocaml/dune#13479](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13479)), and making promotion database abstract ([ocaml/dune#13459](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13459)) by [Rudi Grinberg](https://github.com/rgrinberg)
- **Dune sandboxing infrastructure** refactoring making sandbox arguments explicit in dependency evaluation ([ocaml/dune#13508](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13508), [ocaml/dune#13509](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13509), [ocaml/dune#13503](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13503)) and using direct API for test rule creation ([ocaml/dune#13505](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13505)) by [Rudi Grinberg](https://github.com/rgrinberg)
- **Dune package management** enhancements with PR to remove obsolete `--ignore-lock-dir` flag ([ocaml/dune#13498](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13498)) by [Marek Kubica](https://github.com/Leonidas-from-XIV) and ongoing odoc configuration file generation work ([ocaml/dune#13476](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13476))
- **LSP custom request expansion** with new PR for locate types functionality ([ocaml/ocaml-lsp#1584](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp/issues/1584)) by [Xavier Van de Woestyne](https://github.com/xvw), signature help readability improvements ([ocaml/ocaml-lsp#1580](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp/issues/1580)) by [Charlène_Gros](https://github.com/Lucccyo), and merlin configuration server flexibility for custom build systems ([ocaml/ocaml-lsp#1581](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp/issues/1581)) by [Andrey Popp](https://github.com/andreypopp)
- **Merlin test coverage expansion** with [Charlène_Gros](https://github.com/Lucccyo) adding reproduction cases for historical issues confirming that [ocaml/merlin#1214](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/1214) and [ocaml/merlin#1763](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/1763) have been resolved ([ocaml/merlin#2022](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/2022), [ocaml/merlin#2021](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/2021), [ocaml/merlin#2020](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/2020))
- **Merlin region-based selection** proposal with new `-stop` flag for enclosing command to support region-based selections rather than just point positions ([ocaml/merlin#2029](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/2029)) by [Xavier Van de Woestyne](https://github.com/xvw)
- **opam cmdliner 2.0 compatibility** PR opened enabling future upgrades while maintaining vendored version 1.3.0 ([ocaml/opam#6854](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6854)) by [Brian Ward](https://github.com/WardBrian) with PowerShell completion support opportunities ([ocaml/opam#6853](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6853))
- **opam init workflow improvements** with draft PR to improve `opam switch create` guidance when init fails ([ocaml/opam#6851](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6851)) by [Kate](https://github.com/kit-ty-kate) and license field support continued development ([ocaml/opam#6841](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6841)) by [Raphaël Proust](https://github.com/raphael-proust)
- **Odoc bug fixes** with type substitution crash fix addressing [ocaml/odoc#930](https://github.com/ocaml/odoc/issues/930) which caused `Invalid_argument("List.fold_left2")` crashes ([ocaml/odoc#1400](https://github.com/ocaml/odoc/issues/1400)) and URL remapping bug fix for page references ([ocaml/odoc#1395](https://github.com/ocaml/odoc/issues/1395)) by [Jon Ludlam](https://github.com/jonludlam)
- **js_of_ocaml documentation rewrite** with comprehensive manual restructuring including quickstart guide, JavaScript interop consolidation, syntax reference, and error handling documentation ([ocsigen/js_of_ocaml#2150](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2150)) by [@hhugo](https://github.com/hhugo)
- **js_of_ocaml release preparation** for version 6.3 opened addressing pending PRs and runtime value re-export ([ocsigen/js_of_ocaml#2152](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2152)) by [@hhugo](https://github.com/hhugo)
- **js_of_ocaml parser testing** infrastructure enhanced with tc39/test262 integration for standards compliance ([ocsigen/js_of_ocaml#2149](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2149)) and static evaluation experiment PR opened ([ocsigen/js_of_ocaml#2153](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2153)) by [Jérôme Vouillon](https://github.com/vouillon)
group_summaries.group_overview:
- **Dune** led group activity with sandboxing rollout, package management CLI improvements, promotion system refactoring, and extensive OxCaml integration work ([ocaml/dune#13510](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13510), [ocaml/dune#13458](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13458), [ocaml/dune#13395](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13395))
- **ocaml-lsp** and **Merlin** expanded custom request APIs and improved type system tooling with destruct, locate types, and signature help enhancements ([ocaml/ocaml-lsp#1583](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp/issues/1583), [ocaml/merlin#2023](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/2023))
- **js_of_ocaml** focused on parser modernization with ECMAScript feature support, runtime security improvements, comprehensive manual rewrite, and version 6.3 release preparation ([ocsigen/js_of_ocaml#2108](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2108), [ocsigen/js_of_ocaml#2150](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2150))
- **opam** worked on cmdliner 2.0 compatibility and new user onboarding experience refinement ([ocaml/opam#6854](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6854), [ocaml/opam#6851](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6851))
- **odoc** integrated OxCaml compiler support and fixed type substitution and URL remapping bugs ([ocaml/odoc#1399](https://github.com/ocaml/odoc/issues/1399), [ocaml/odoc#1400](https://github.com/ocaml/odoc/issues/1400))
- **ocamlfind**, **opam-file-format**, and **spawn** had no recorded activity this week
group_summaries.cross_repository_work:
- **OxCaml compiler support** coordinated across Dune workspace files ([ocaml/dune#13395](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13395)), odoc AST handling with dune 3.21's `%{ocaml-config:ox}` variable ([ocaml/odoc#1399](https://github.com/ocaml/odoc/issues/1399)), and ongoing js_of_ocaml parameterized library support ([ocaml/dune#13414](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13414))
- **Merlin and ocaml-lsp integration** with custom request expansion exposing Merlin's destruct ([ocaml/ocaml-lsp#1583](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp/issues/1583)) and locate-types functionality ([ocaml/ocaml-lsp#1584](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp/issues/1584)) directly to editor clients, plus region-based selection work ([ocaml/merlin#2029](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/2029))
- **Dune and odoc collaboration** with dune 3.21 requirement enabling OxCaml detection ([ocaml/odoc#1398](https://github.com/ocaml/odoc/issues/1398)) and ongoing odoc configuration file generation work ([ocaml/dune#13476](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13476))
- **Test infrastructure improvements** across Dune with Nix-based reverse dependency testing ([ocaml/dune#13222](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13222)) and js_of_ocaml with tc39/test262 integration ([ocsigen/js_of_ocaml#2149](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2149))
group_summaries.notable_discussions:
- **Dune package management flag consolidation** debated merging `--ignore-lock-dir` into `--pkg` flag ([ocaml/dune#13468](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13468), [ocaml/dune#13469](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13469), [ocaml/dune#13472](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13472)) considering options like `--pkg=autolocking` versus removing the flag entirely, led by [Ambre Austen Suhamy](https://github.com/ElectreAAS) and [Marek Kubica](https://github.com/Leonidas-from-XIV)
- **Dune sandbox promotion mechanism** discussion on revived `patch_back_source_tree` feature ([ocaml/dune#13495](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13495)) for actions that modify dependencies with debate about naming and whether to use mode versus sandbox parameter, featuring [Antonio Nuno Monteiro](https://github.com/anmonteiro) and [Rudi Grinberg](https://github.com/rgrinberg)
- **Dune odoc configuration** discussion on generating `odoc-config.sexp` files ([ocaml/dune#13485](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13485)) with implementation work in [ocaml/dune#13476](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13476) addressing `:with-doc` dependencies and `:post` dependency handling
- **LSP type representation API** discussed between [Ulysse](https://github.com/voodoos) and [Xavier Van de Woestyne](https://github.com/xvw) regarding whether compact `set` field provides value or adds unnecessary protocol complexity in locate types ([ocaml/ocaml-lsp#1584](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp/issues/1584))
- **Merlin region-based code selection** discussion around proposed `-stop` flag for enclosing command, with [Xavier Van de Woestyne](https://github.com/xvw) explaining that LSP's point-based positions are insufficient for OCaml's expression-heavy structure ([ocaml/merlin#2029](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/2029))
- **opam cmdliner upgrade path** discussed across multiple issues with [Josh Berdine](https://github.com/jberdine) requesting upstream fixes ([ocaml/opam#6849](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6849)), [Daniel Bünzli](https://github.com/dbuenzli) suggesting vendoring cmdliner 2.0 with legacy prefix patch, and [Brian Ward](https://github.com/WardBrian) volunteering to handle upgrade work including PowerShell completion support ([ocaml/opam#6853](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6853))
- **opam first-time user experience** extensively debated after [@przemmeq0](https://github.com/przemmeq0) reported that `opam init` silently exits when default switch creation fails ([ocaml/opam#6848](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6848)), with detailed analysis showing unclear note message and incorrect command suggestions
- **Odoc cppo conditional preprocessing** challenges noted by [@art-w](https://github.com/art-w) where cppo only accepts integer values in conditionals but dune's `%{ocaml-config:ox}` returns boolean with no casting mechanism ([ocaml/odoc#1399](https://github.com/ocaml/odoc/issues/1399))
group_summaries.emerging_trends:
- **Sandboxing expansion** across toolchain with Dune enabling test sandboxing by default from 3.22 ([ocaml/dune#13510](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13510)), MDX sandboxing from 0.5 ([ocaml/dune#13504](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13504)), and extensive infrastructure refactoring ([ocaml/dune#13508](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13508), [ocaml/dune#13509](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13509))
- **OxCaml compiler integration** coordinated effort bringing experimental compiler support into mainstream tools through Dune, odoc, and js_of_ocaml with conditional compilation and AST version handling ([ocaml/dune#13395](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13395), [ocaml/odoc#1399](https://github.com/ocaml/odoc/issues/1399), [ocaml/dune#13414](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13414))
- **Custom LSP request expansion** continuing trend of exposing Merlin capabilities directly through ocaml-lsp custom requests rather than code actions, with destruct and locate-types following earlier patterns ([ocaml/ocaml-lsp#1583](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp/issues/1583), [ocaml/ocaml-lsp#1584](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp/issues/1584))
- **Package management UX refinement** across Dune and opam with command-line controls ([ocaml/dune#13458](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13458)), flag consolidation discussions ([ocaml/dune#13498](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13498)), and improved initialization guidance ([ocaml/opam#6851](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6851))
- **Documentation quality focus** with js_of_ocaml comprehensive manual rewrite ([ocsigen/js_of_ocaml#2150](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2150)) and Dune tracing documentation improvements ([ocaml/dune#13488](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13488))
- **Standards compliance emphasis** through js_of_ocaml's tc39/test262 integration for ECMAScript validation ([ocsigen/js_of_ocaml#2149](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2149)) and parser modernization with decorator and HTML comment support
- **Test infrastructure modernization** with Dune's Nix-based reverse dependency testing ([ocaml/dune#13222](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13222)) and Merlin's systematic historical issue reproduction ([ocaml/merlin#2022](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/2022), [ocaml/merlin#2021](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/2021))
- **Platform compatibility improvements** with opam Windows SSL troubleshooting ([ocaml/opam#6847](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6847)), PowerShell completion work ([ocaml/opam#6853](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6853)), and relocatable compiler support ([ocaml/dune#13229](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13229))

group_summaries.brief_summary: ARM64 binary emitter shipped with verification tooling, editor hover improvements, and locality type system integration
group_summaries.new_features_summary: ARM64 binary emitter, kind-enclosing queries, unboxed unit types, opam-core locality patches
group_summaries.new_features:
- Binary **machine code emitter for ARM64** architecture by [Mark Shinwell](https://github.com/mshinwell) in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml), replacing text-based assembly generation with direct binary output for JIT compilation ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5177](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5177), [oxcaml/oxcaml#5340](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5340), [oxcaml/oxcaml#5188](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5188))
- Binary emitter **verification infrastructure** by [Mark Shinwell](https://github.com/mshinwell) in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) with new `-verify-binary-emitter` flag that compares generated binary output against system assembler for correctness validation ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5198](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5198), [oxcaml/oxcaml#5345](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5345))
- New **kind-enclosing query** command in [oxcaml/merlin](https://github.com/oxcaml/merlin) by [Liam Stevenson](https://github.com/liam923) as jkind analogue of type-enclosing hovers, enabling developers to view kinds at cursor position ([oxcaml/merlin#208](https://github.com/oxcaml/merlin/issues/208))
- **Unboxed unit literal syntax** `#()` added to [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) by [Nailen Matschke](https://github.com/nmatschke) for zero-sized unboxed tuple representation ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5156](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5156))
- Abstract **`unit#` type** of kind `void mod everything` introduced in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) by [Ryan Tjoa](https://github.com/rtjoa) as unboxed unit variant created with `%unbox_unit` primitive ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5151](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5151))
- New **`%domain_index` primitive** in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) by [Max Slater](https://github.com/TheNumbat) implements `Domain.self_index` directly in the compiler for efficient domain identification ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5312](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5312))
- **New opam-core 2.5.0+ox package** in [oxcaml/opam-repository](https://github.com/oxcaml/opam-repository) with patches by [@art-w](https://github.com/art-w) to fix locality type conversion issues where `fn : _ @ local -> _` expressions now work with explicit lambda wrappers `(fun x -> fn x)` for proper `@ global` casting ([oxcaml/opam-repository#33](https://github.com/oxcaml/opam-repository/issues/33))
- **New opam-format 2.5.0+ox package** added to [oxcaml/opam-repository](https://github.com/oxcaml/opam-repository) as dependency for opam tooling, enabling proper format library support for opam 2.5 under OxCaml ([oxcaml/opam-repository#33](https://github.com/oxcaml/opam-repository/issues/33))
- **Improved `Gc.stat` and `Gc.quick_stat`** reporting in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) by [Nick Barnes](https://github.com/NickBarnes) with runtime 5 support for `heap_chunks` field and better documentation of cost differences between functions ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5226](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5226))
- Support for **arrays of unboxed pairs of vec128s** in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) by [Max Slater](https://github.com/TheNumbat) enabling vec128 & vec128 and vec128 & vec128 & vec128 & vec128 array types for SIMD operations ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5239](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5239))
- Enhanced **verbosity control** in [oxcaml/merlin](https://github.com/oxcaml/merlin) for kind-enclosing query with `override_verbosity` option allowing custom verbosity levels independent of main Mconfig settings ([oxcaml/merlin#208](https://github.com/oxcaml/merlin/issues/208))
- **64-bit EH frame support** for dissector in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) by [Mark Shinwell](https://github.com/mshinwell) with new `-dissector-assume-lld-without-64-bit-eh-frames` command-line flags ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5303](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5303))
- Fixed **record field autocompletion** in [oxcaml/merlin](https://github.com/oxcaml/merlin) by [Kostia Balytskyi](https://github.com/ikostia) cherry-picking upstream changes addressing completion issues ([oxcaml/merlin#209](https://github.com/oxcaml/merlin/issues/209), [ocaml/merlin#2028](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/2028))
- Enhanced **locate-types command** in [oxcaml/merlin](https://github.com/oxcaml/merlin) by [Liam Stevenson](https://github.com/liam923) to include variables in results and properly handle optional function parameters by stripping option types ([oxcaml/merlin#207](https://github.com/oxcaml/merlin/issues/207), [ocaml/merlin#2025](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/2025), [ocaml/merlin#2027](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/2027))
- **CI testing expanded** in [oxcaml/opam-repository](https://github.com/oxcaml/opam-repository) to include odoc and sherlodoc packages in the automated installation verification workflow by [mt_caret](https://github.com/mt-caret) ([oxcaml/opam-repository#34](https://github.com/oxcaml/opam-repository/issues/34))
group_summaries.activity_summary: 24 new PRs opened in oxcaml/oxcaml for type system work, backend improvements, and upstream synchronization
group_summaries.activity:
- [Jakub Bachurski](https://github.com/jbachurski) opened **six new PRs** in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) for metaprogramming improvements including module pack annotations ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5320](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5320)), quote and splice typing fixes ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5323](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5323)), lazy substitution construction ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5347](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5347)), empty `Tpoly` handling ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5336](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5336)), test installation paths ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5314](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5314)), and revert consideration ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5317](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5317))

- [Simon Spies](https://github.com/spiessimon) opened **upstream merge PR** in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) for OCaml 5.4 integration ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5325](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5325)) and runtime array function rename backport ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5339](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5339))

group_summaries.cross_repository_work:

- **Compiler merge coordination** with [oxcaml/merlin](https://github.com/oxcaml/merlin) tracking [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) changes through 5.2.0minus-29 merge ([oxcaml/merlin#212](https://github.com/oxcaml/merlin/issues/212)) bringing typing system updates, jkind refactoring, and mode system improvements across both repositories
- **Locality type system integration** pattern emerging across [oxcaml/opam-repository](https://github.com/oxcaml/opam-repository) with opam-core patches ([oxcaml/opam-repository#33](https://github.com/oxcaml/opam-repository/issues/33)) following similar work previously done for other ecosystem packages, with [Anil Madhavapeddy](https://github.com/avsm) suggesting these fixes should be contributed upstream similar to [ocaml/dune#13342](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13342)
- **Documentation toolchain verification** in [oxcaml/opam-repository](https://github.com/oxcaml/opam-repository) expanding to include odoc and sherlodoc packages ([oxcaml/opam-repository#34](https://github.com/oxcaml/opam-repository/issues/34)) resolving installation verification for oxcaml/odoc#22 compilation errors
- **Upstream synchronization efforts** coordinated across repositories with [Simon Spies](https://github.com/spiessimon) preparing OCaml 5.4 merge in [oxcaml/oxcaml#5325](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5325) and [oxcaml/merlin](https://github.com/oxcaml/merlin) cherry-picking improvements from [ocaml/merlin](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin) ([oxcaml/merlin#207](https://github.com/oxcaml/merlin/issues/207), [oxcaml/merlin#209](https://github.com/oxcaml/merlin/issues/209))
group_summaries.emerging_trends:
- **ARM64 backend maturation** in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) with [Mark Shinwell](https://github.com/mshinwell) delivering production-ready binary emitter infrastructure replacing assembly text generation, including comprehensive verification tooling and EH frame support ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5177](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5177), [oxcaml/oxcaml#5198](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5198), [oxcaml/oxcaml#5303](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5303), [oxcaml/oxcaml#5340](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5340), [oxcaml/oxcaml#5345](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5345), [oxcaml/oxcaml#5188](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5188))
- **Unboxed type system expansion** across [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) with new `unit#` type by [Ryan Tjoa](https://github.com/rtjoa) ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5151](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5151)), `#()` syntax by [Nailen Matschke](https://github.com/nmatschke) ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5156](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5156)), block index optimizations ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5324](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5324)), and ongoing kind system work with `box_` operators ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5342](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5342), [oxcaml/oxcaml#5343](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5343))
- **Metaprogramming quote system development** in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) by [Jakub Bachurski](https://github.com/jbachurski) with polymorphic application type inspection ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5154](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5154)), comprehensive testing ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5214](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5214)), and six new PRs addressing module packs ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5320](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5320)), typing fixes ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5323](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5323)), and type system refinements ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5336](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5336), [oxcaml/oxcaml#5347](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5347))
- **Editor tooling enhancements** in [oxcaml/merlin](https://github.com/oxcaml/merlin) focused on hover capabilities with new kind-enclosing ([oxcaml/merlin#208](https://github.com/oxcaml/merlin/issues/208)) and planned mode-enclosing ([oxcaml/merlin#210](https://github.com/oxcaml/merlin/issues/210)) queries providing more type system information at cursor position, plus improved locate-types results ([oxcaml/merlin#207](https://github.com/oxcaml/merlin/issues/207))
- **Locality type system integration** continuing across [oxcaml/opam-repository](https://github.com/oxcaml/opam-repository) requiring patches for ecosystem packages, with opam-core joining the growing list of packages needing explicit type conversion workarounds for functions with locality annotations ([oxcaml/opam-repository#33](https://github.com/oxcaml/opam-repository/issues/33))
- **Upstream contribution opportunities** emerging as OxCaml-specific fixes could benefit the broader OCaml ecosystem when generalized, following the pattern established with the dune project ([ocaml/dune#13342](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13342)), as suggested by [Anil Madhavapeddy](https://github.com/avsm) for locality fixes in [oxcaml/opam-repository#33](https://github.com/oxcaml/opam-repository/issues/33)
- **SIMD and vector type support** growing in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) with vec128 pair arrays by [Max Slater](https://github.com/TheNumbat) ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5239](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5239)) and bigstring safety refactoring ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5307](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5307)) for ARM translation requirements

group_summaries.brief_summary: Testing infrastructure modernization, architecture support expansion, and stdlib guidelines
group_summaries.new_features_summary: ocamltest negation syntax, stdlib guidelines, string miscompilation fix, C++ API testing
group_summaries.new_features:
- Fixed **string operation miscompilation** affecting liveness analysis in native code generation, backported to 5.4 branch ([ocaml/ocaml#14010](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14010))
- **ocamltest negation syntax** added allowing `not <action>` to negate predicate-like actions in test specifications ([ocaml/ocaml#14502](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14502))
- **ocamltest legacy syntax** removed including the old tree syntax with `***` and the `-translate` option that converted from this syntax ([ocaml/ocaml#14499](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14499))
- **stdlib design guidelines** added in GUIDELINES.md covering scope, consistency, pragmatism, ergonomics, generality, naming, and stability principles for standard library development ([ocaml/ocaml#14459](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14459))
- **C++ API compatibility testing** improved with GCC and MSVC SARIF diagnostics, refactored bigarray.h C++ support to suppress warnings in strict mode ([ocaml/ocaml#14421](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14421), [ocaml/ocaml#14496](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14496))
- **Public header testing** hardened with pedantic compilation checks for each header individually, added include guard to sizeclasses.h, and consistent macro usage for promoted header checks ([ocaml/ocaml#14498](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14498), [ocaml/ocaml#14494](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14494))
- **ocamltest actions** added for compiler type detection including `msvc`, `clang`, `has-cxx` actions and exposed `cxx` and `ccomp_type` variables ([ocaml/ocaml#14502](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14502), [ocaml/ocaml#14421](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14421))
- **ocamltest self-testing** infrastructure added allowing ocamltest to test itself with new `ocamltest` action ([ocaml/ocaml#13317](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13317))
group_summaries.group_overview:
- [ocaml/ocaml](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml) focused on testing infrastructure modernization with four ocamltest PRs merged by [Gabriel Scherer](https://github.com/gasche) ([ocaml/ocaml#14502](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14502), [ocaml/ocaml#14501](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14501), [ocaml/ocaml#14499](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14499), [ocaml/ocaml#13317](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13317))
- Architecture support expansion with three new PRs for frame pointer support on RiscV and POWER platforms by [Tim McGilchrist](https://github.com/tmcgilchrist) ([ocaml/ocaml#14506](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14506), [ocaml/ocaml#14505](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14505)) and [Zane Hambly](https://github.com/Zaneham) ([ocaml/ocaml#14504](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14504)), plus CFI information fixes for s390x ([ocaml/ocaml#14500](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14500))
- Runtime and GC improvements with four PRs from [Nick Barnes](https://github.com/NickBarnes) addressing minor GC bugs and memory management issues ([ocaml/ocaml#14495](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14495), [ocaml/ocaml#14493](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14493), [ocaml/ocaml#14492](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14492), [ocaml/ocaml#14494](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14494))
- Stdlib governance formalization through documented design guidelines merged from [Nicolás Ojeda Bär](https://github.com/nojb) ([ocaml/ocaml#14459](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14459))
- [ocaml/RFCs](https://github.com/ocaml/RFCs) had no activity this week

weekly_summary.group_overview:
- __RUMINANT:core__ Testing infrastructure modernization with [Gabriel Scherer](https://github.com/gasche) delivering four ocamltest PRs merged in [ocaml/ocaml#14502](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14502), [ocaml/ocaml#14501](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14501), [ocaml/ocaml#14499](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14499), and [ocaml/ocaml#13317](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13317), adding negation syntax, internal refactoring, legacy syntax removal, and self-testing capability
- __RUMINANT:core__ Architecture support expansion with three new PRs for frame pointer support on RiscV by [Tim McGilchrist](https://github.com/tmcgilchrist) in [ocaml/ocaml#14506](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14506) and [Zane Hambly](https://github.com/Zaneham) in [ocaml/ocaml#14504](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14504), POWER platform support in [ocaml/ocaml#14505](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14505), and CFI information fixes for s390x in [ocaml/ocaml#14500](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14500)
- __RUMINANT:core__ Runtime and GC improvements with [Nick Barnes](https://github.com/NickBarnes) addressing four PRs for minor GC bugs and memory management issues in [ocaml/ocaml#14495](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14495), [ocaml/ocaml#14493](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14493), [ocaml/ocaml#14492](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14492), and [ocaml/ocaml#14494](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14494)

- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ ARM64 backend shipped production-ready binary emitter infrastructure by [Mark Shinwell](https://github.com/mshinwell) with six merged PRs in [oxcaml/oxcaml#5177](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5177), [oxcaml/oxcaml#5340](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5340), [oxcaml/oxcaml#5188](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5188), [oxcaml/oxcaml#5198](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5198), [oxcaml/oxcaml#5345](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5345), and [oxcaml/oxcaml#5303](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5303)

weekly_summary.notable_discussions:
- __RUMINANT:ecosystem__ **CI infrastructure issue** resolved in [ocaml/opam-repository](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository) where Docker manifest inspection timeouts caused "No job variant" errors across multiple workflows in [ocaml/opam-repository#29296](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29296), explained by [Mark Elvers](https://github.com/mtelvers) as 504 Gateway Timeouts during periodic SHA polling
- __RUMINANT:ecosystem__ **opam-2.0 deprecation discussion** ongoing with [Hannes Mehnert](https://github.com/hannesm) and [Anil Madhavapeddy](https://github.com/avsm) noting the team is moving toward deprecating opam 2.0.x in favor of 2.1+ in [ocaml/opam-repository#28952](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/28952) and [discuss.ocaml.org](https://discuss.ocaml.org/t/proposal-make-the-minimum-tested-opam-2-1-and-higher/17736)
- __RUMINANT:ecosystem__ **OCaml compiler support policy** discussion initiated by [Hannes Mehnert](https://github.com/hannesm) proposing to narrow supported versions to OCaml 4.14+ and 5.3+ from current 4.08.1-5.4.0 range in [ocaml/opam-repository#29059](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29059), with [Anil Madhavapeddy](https://github.com/avsm) noting Debian 11 LTS support ending August 2026 (OCaml 4.11.1) as reasonable minimum floor
- __RUMINANT:ecosystem__ **Missing package documentation** reported by multiple users including [Raphaël Proust](https://github.com/raphael-proust) for lwt6 in [ocaml/ocaml.org#3451](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3451), [Alina Banerjee](https://github.com/alinab) for eio and domainslib in [ocaml/ocaml.org#3461](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3461), and ongoing discussion about QCheck 0.90/0.91 documentation in [ocaml/ocaml.org#3437](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3437), with consensus to migrate issues to [ocaml-docs-ci](https://github.com/ocurrent/ocaml-docs-ci) repository
- __RUMINANT:ecosystem__ **Governance page visibility** discussed by [Nicolás Ojeda Bär](https://github.com/nojb) proposing to make it a top-level navigation item in [ocaml/ocaml.org#3466](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3466), with [Cuihtlauac Alvarado](https://github.com/cuihtlauac) suggesting it fits better under the Community section
- __RUMINANT:ecosystem__ **OCaml Planet RSS feed** enhancement requested by [Puneeth Chaganti](https://github.com/punchagan) to include full blog post content instead of snippets in [ocaml/ocaml.org#3459](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3459), referencing [Yawar Amin](https://github.com/yawaramin)'s previous request in [ocaml/ocaml.org#3125](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3125) for improved offline reading support
- __RUMINANT:tools__ **Dune package management flag consolidation** debated merging `--ignore-lock-dir` into `--pkg` flag in [ocaml/dune#13468](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13468), [ocaml/dune#13469](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13469), and [ocaml/dune#13472](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13472) considering options like `--pkg=autolocking` versus removing the flag entirely, led by [Ambre Austen Suhamy](https://github.com/ElectreAAS) and [Marek Kubica](https://github.com/Leonidas-from-XIV)
- __RUMINANT:tools__ **Merlin region-based code selection** discussion around proposed `-stop` flag for enclosing command, with [Xavier Van de Woestyne](https://github.com/xvw) explaining that LSP's point-based positions are insufficient for OCaml's expression-heavy structure in [ocaml/merlin#2029](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/2029)
